RBI Governor's Statement on Monetary Policy

Date: 15 January 2024

The Monetary Policy Committee (MPC) met on February 6-8, 2024 and decided to keep the policy repo rate unchanged at 6.50%.

The MPC noted that inflation has been moderating but remains above the target. The Committee remains focused on withdrawal of accommodation to ensure that inflation progressively aligns to the target.

Reference: DBR.No.BP.BC.83/21.04.048/2023-24
